descriptions: The Caia-Laganà-Gioffrè faction split into Caia-Gioffrè and Laganà, which then conflicted.
edges.evidence_quote: successivamente sono entrati in conflitto scindendosi in Caia-Gioffrè e Laganà

Revolutionary Armed Forces of Colombia.description: Far-left Marxist-Leninist guerrilla group involved in the Colombian conflict, founded in 1964 from peasant self-defense groups. Funded by kidnap, ransom, extortion, and drug trafficking. Engaged in terrorism and unconventional warfare. Demobilized in 2017 after a peace agreement, though dissident factions remain active.

descriptions: Alvaro, Pesce, and Coluccio-Aquino trafficked drugs together with a FARC commander.
edges.evidence_quote: blocca un traffico internazionale di droga tra gli Alvaro , i Pesce e i Coluccio-Aquino insieme ad un comandante delle FARC colombiane

descriptions: The Mancuso have contacts with the FARC.
edges.evidence_quote: Hanno contatti con ... le FARC colombiane

descriptions: Mancuso has contacts with FARC.
edges.evidence_quote: Hanno contatti con ... le FARC colombiane

descriptions: Mancuso 'ndrina historically had contacts with FARC.
edges.evidence_quote: historically with the Colombian FARC

descriptions: Alvaro, Pesce, and Coluccio-Aquino trafficked drugs together with a FARC commander.
edges.evidence_quote: blocca un traffico internazionale di droga tra gli Alvaro , i Pesce e i Coluccio-Aquino insieme ad un comandante delle FARC colombiane

descriptions: Pesce cooperated with FARC in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 17 giugno 2015 si conclude un'operazione ... che blocca un traffico internazionale di droga tra gli Alvaro , i Pesce e i Coluccio-Aquino insieme ad un comandante delle FARC colombiane .

descriptions: Alvaro, Pesce, and Coluccio-Aquino trafficked drugs together with a FARC commander.
edges.evidence_quote: blocca un traffico internazionale di droga tra gli Alvaro , i Pesce e i Coluccio-Aquino insieme ad un comandante delle FARC colombiane

descriptions: AUC fought against FARC-EP as part of counterinsurgency.
edges.evidence_quote: As a response, the AUC engaged in a renewed series of massacres and assassinations, often with the passive or active aid of elements of the Colombian government's security forces, according to human rights organizations.

descriptions: AUC fought against FARC.
edges.evidence_quote: the United Self-Defense Forces of Colombia (AUC), a paramilitary death squad that was formed not only for the purpose of fighting the Cartel but also the Revolutionary Armed Forces of Colombia (FARC)

descriptions: AUC considered FARC as main enemy and engaged in conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: The AUC's main enemies were the leftist insurgency groups Revolutionary Armed Forces of Colombia (FARC) and the National Liberation Army (ELN).

descriptions: The AUC conducted retaliations and attacks against the FARC.
edges.evidence_quote: The AUC was responsible for retaliations against the FARC and ELN communist organization as well as numerous attacks against civilians beginning in 1997 with the Mapiripán massacre.

descriptions: Bloque Meta fought against FARC.
edges.evidence_quote: to continue the counterrevolutionary struggle against the FARC in Colombia's eastern plains.

descriptions: Medellín Cartel was in conflict with guerrillas like FARC.
edges.evidence_quote: When conflicts emerged between the Medellín Cartel and the guerrillas, the cartel also promoted the creation of paramilitary groups.

descriptions: The Medellín Cartel formed a vigilante group to defend against FARC.
edges.evidence_quote: the drug lords of the Medellín Cartel formed a paramilitary vigilante group known as Muerte a Secuestradores ("Death to Kidnappers") to defend the cartel against the FARC and M-19

descriptions: CCA is involved with former FARC members.
edges.evidence_quote: O CCA estaria envolvido com cartéis da Colômbia e ex-integrantes das FARC

descriptions: CV established a working relationship with FARC, exchanging arms for cocaine.
edges.evidence_quote: After Pablo Escobar's death, the CV established a working relationship with the FARC, a Colombian guerrilla group which moved into the cocaine trade.

descriptions: CV had business dealings with FARC through leader Fernandinho Beira-Mar.
edges.evidence_quote: Beira-Mar is an imprisoned senior leader who led the CV's business dealings with the FARC

descriptions: FARC is listed as an ally of ETA in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Batasuna , Herri Batasuna , FARC , FLB-ARB , Provisional IRA , Terra Lliure

descriptions: ETA had contacts with FARC; ETA members received training from FARC.
edges.evidence_quote: The Colombian government stated that there are contacts between ETA and the Colombian guerrillas FARC. The recent capture of FARC's leaders' computers, and leaked email exchanges between both groups, show that ETA members received training from FARC.

descriptions: FDN has connections with FARC in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Há fortes indícios de que a FDN faça parte de uma rede internacional de tráfico de drogas com fortes conexões com as FARC na Colômbia

descriptions: Hezbollah allied with FARC and the North Valley Cartel for drug smuggling and money laundering.
edges.evidence_quote: the joint operations between the United States and Colombia resulted in the arrest of nearly 130 individuals suspected of being members of a cell formed from an alliance among a famous Colombian drug syndicate known as 'North Valley', an armed leftist militant organisation composed by former and current members of FARC, and a group of smugglers of Lebanese origin

descriptions: Libertadores del Vichada fought battles against the FARC.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Libertadores del Vichada have frequently fought battles against the FARC rebel group in eastern Colombia.

descriptions: Los Paisas may have reached agreements with FARC fronts.
edges.evidence_quote: pudieron haber llegado a acuerdos con otros grupos al margen de la ley como algunos frentes de las Fuerzas Armadas Revolucionarias de Colombia (FARC).

descriptions: Los Rastrojos frequently fought battles against FARC.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Rastrojos han librado frecuentemente batallas contra los grupos guerrilleros de las Fuerzas Armadas Revolucionarias de Colombia

descriptions: Los Rastrojos had a cooperative agreement with the FARC.
edges.evidence_quote: More recently they obtained a similar agreement with the Revolutionary Armed Forces of Colombia (Fuerzas Armadas Revolucionarias de Colombia – FARC) in other parts of the country.

descriptions: MAS was formed to fight against guerrillas including FARC.
edges.evidence_quote: They formed this organization to defend their economic interests, to fight against the guerrillas

descriptions: FARC and ELN fought each other in Arauca in 2006.
edges.evidence_quote: In mid-2006, mutual rivalries between local FARC and ELN forces escalated into hostilities in Arauca, along the border with Venezuela. According to the BBC, 'the FARC have for some years moved to take over ELN territory near the Venezuelan border, and the smaller rebel army reacted by killing several FARC militants'. A statement posted on FARC's homepage accused the ELN of 'attacks that we only expected from the enemy'.

descriptions: ELN and FARC-EP occasionally conducted joint attacks against civilians.
edges.evidence_quote: The ELN also occasionally operated with the FARC-EP, and like FARC, it has targeted civilians, according to a February 2005 report by the United Nations High Commissioner for Human Rights: 'During 2004, the FARC-EP and the ELN carried out a series of attacks against the civilian population, including several massacres of civilians and kidnappings by the FARC-EP. There were occasional joint actions by the FARC-EP and the ELN.'

descriptions: IRA trained FARC members in bomb-making and received drug proceeds in exchange.
edges.evidence_quote: Their report alleged a longstanding connection between the IRA and FARC–EP, mentioned at least 15 IRA members who had been travelling in and out of Colombia since 1998, and estimated that the IRA had received at least $2 million in drug proceeds for training FARC–EP members.

edges.source: Peasant Self-Defenders of Córdoba and Urabá
descriptions: ACCU was formed to fight FARC-EP in retaliation for killing their father.
edges.evidence_quote: It was founded by Fidel Castaño , Carlos Castaño and Vicente Castaño to retaliate against the assassination of their father Jesús Castaño by FARC-EP guerrillas.

edges.source: Peasant Self-Defenders of Córdoba and Urabá
descriptions: ACCU fought against FARC-EP guerrillas.
edges.evidence_quote: The ACCU began working with regional military forces ... to crush the guerrillas

edges.source: Popular Front for the Liberation of Palestine
descriptions: PFLP developed ties with FARC.
edges.evidence_quote: From its foundation, the PFLP sought superpower patrons, early on developing ties with the Soviet Union, the People's Republic of China, and, at various times, with regional powers such as Syria, South Yemen, Libya, North Korea, and Iraq, as well as with left-wing groups around the world, including the FARC and the Japanese Red Army.

descriptions: EPL and FARC-EP were allies until 2016.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: FARC-EP ( Hasta 2016 )

descriptions: EPL conducted joint actions with FARC-EP.
edges.evidence_quote: Realizó algunas acciones en conjunto con la guerrilla de las FARC-EP, como la realizada en Hacarí (Norte de Santander).

descriptions: Infobox lists FARC as an ally of the EPL.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Group of Popular Combatants , PCP (m-l) , FARC

descriptions: PCC lists FARC as an ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Latin America : TCP , GDE , BDM , EPP , FARC , Tren de Aragua , Jalisco Cartel , Massa Carcerária [ pt ] , Primer Cartel Uruguayo.

descriptions: FARC is listed as an ally of the Provisional IRA in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: NORAID (Irish Americans) , Libya , PLO , ETA , FARC

descriptions: The IRA trained FARC in bomb-making techniques.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2001, three Irishmen, known as the Colombia Three, were arrested and accused of training Colombian guerrillas, the Revolutionary Armed Forces of Colombia (FARC).

descriptions: AUC leaders expressed support for anti-FARC protests, indicating opposition to FARC.
edges.evidence_quote: Shortly before the rallies took place 13 demobilised AUC paramilitary leaders, including Salvatore Mancuso, had expressed their support of the protest through a communique. However, this move was rejected by organiser Carlos Andrés Santiago, who stated that such an endorsement was harmful and criticised the AUC's actions.

descriptions: FARC is allied with the CJNG drug cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Drug cartels CJNG , Sinaloa Cartel

descriptions: EMC is a dissident faction of FARC that rejects the peace deal.
edges.evidence_quote: In August 2024 the government announced an end to a ceasefire with the smaller dissident FARC faction the Estado Mayor Central, EMC, who reject the 2016 peace deal.

descriptions: FARC is allied with ETA.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Euskadi Ta Askatasuna

descriptions: FARC was allied with FALN until 1969.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: FALN (until 1969)

descriptions: FARC is opposed by the paramilitary group Muerte a Secuestradores.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: Muerte a Secuestradores

descriptions: FARC is allied with the ELN.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Armed groups ELN

descriptions: FARC and ELN announced cooperation to seek a political solution to the conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: On 1 July 2013, FARC and the second-largest guerrilla group in Colombia, ELN, announced that they would be working together to find a 'political solution to the social and armed conflict.'

descriptions: FARC was allied with the Provisional IRA until 2005.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Provisional IRA (until 2005)

descriptions: FARC is allied with the Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Drug cartels CJNG , Sinaloa Cartel

descriptions: A Shining Path faction allegedly allied with FARC in the early 2000s.
edges.evidence_quote: The group had allegedly made an alliance with the Revolutionary Armed Forces of Colombia (FARC) in the early 2000s, learning how to use rockets against aircraft.

descriptions: Sinaloa Cartel finances and supports FARC dissidents.
edges.evidence_quote: the Sinaloa Cartel is a major player in the global cocaine trade operating within Colombia where it helps finance and support several of Colombia's local paramilitary drug-trafficking groups such as ... dissidents of FARC

descriptions: Cártel de Sinaloa established contacts with FARC to traffic Colombian cocaine.
edges.evidence_quote: apoderándose del tráfico de cocaína colombiana en los mercados mundiales gracias a los contactos establecidos con la guerrilla de las FARC

descriptions: Tijuana Cartel has ties with FARC.
edges.evidence_quote: The Tijuana Cartel is believed to have ties with FARC, a Colombia guerrilla group

descriptions: The PKK lists the Marxist–Leninist Communist Party (Turkey) as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Marxist–Leninist Communist Party (Turkey)

descriptions: The Fancy Boys is a rival of The Americans.
edges.evidence_quote: The Rivals of the Americans gang include all gangs affiliated to the British gang corporate body. These include the Hard Livings , 28s street gang, Junky Funky Kids, Ghetto Kids, Nice Time Kids, The Terrible West Siders, The Fancy Boys, 6bop gang, Mongrels, Young Gifteds and Terrible Josters.

descriptions: Takenaka-gumi is a subsidiary family within Yamaguchi-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: Masahisa Takenaka (kumichō of the Takenaka-gumi) to be the fourth kumichō of Yamaguchi-gumi

descriptions: Mestrini group had strong ties to the Mala del Brenta.
edges.evidence_quote: The "Mestrini" group, based in Mestre, on the immediate Venetian mainland: a powerful group with strong ties to the Mala del Brenta

descriptions: Lazy Gents were an early rival of the Gaylords.
edges.evidence_quote: Among their earliest rivals were the C-Notes, Lazy Gents, and Playboys.

descriptions: La Hermandad es un clan perteneciente al Tren de Aragua en Chile.
edges.evidence_quote: seis miembros del tren de Aragua en Chile que pertenecían al clan conocido como 'La Hermandad'

Los Choneros.description: Los Choneros is an organized crime syndicate from Ecuador, involved in drug trafficking, extortion, robbery, and other crimes. Originating in Manabí Province in the 1990s, it functions as the armed wing of the Sinaloa Cartel in Ecuador. The group has significant influence over security officials and politicians, and its leader José Adolfo Macías Villamar escaped prison in 2024, triggering an armed conflict. As of 2025, the group remains active with an estimated 12,000-20,000 members.

descriptions: Los Choneros is listed as an ally of AGC in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Sinaloa Cartel , CJNG , Brothers Keepers , 'Ndrangheta , Sicilian Mafia , Los Choneros , Los Contrabandistas , Los Cachiros , Los Rastrojos

descriptions: Infobox lists Los Choneros as an enemy of CJNG.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Grupo Flechas, Cártel del Noreste, Cártel de Guasave, Cártel Nueva Plaza, Guerreros Unidos, Artistas Asesinos, Cártel de Santa Rosa de Lima, La Familia Michoacana, Los Caballeros Templarios, Los Talibanes, Unión Tepito, Cártel de los Soles, Los Choneros

edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Los Choneros

descriptions: Los Chone Killers were originally an armed wing of Los Choneros, then separated in 2020.
edges.evidence_quote: Eran un brazo armado de Los Choneros hasta que se separaron en 2020

descriptions: Los Chone Killers were formerly part of Los Choneros but later attacked them.
edges.evidence_quote: El subgrupo de ... Los Chone Killers ... que funcionaban como parte de Los Choneros y protagonizaron la masacre carcelaria

edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Los Chone Killers (actualmente)

descriptions: Los Lobos are enemies of Los Choneros.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Los Lobos

descriptions: Los Pepes emerged as a splinter faction from Los Choneros.
edges.evidence_quote: In Manabí, government crackdowns on the Choneros led to the emergence of violent splinter factions, including Los Pepes, a coalition of eight smaller gangs.

descriptions: Los Choneros and Los Queseros were in a violent conflict that led to the extermination of the Queseros.
edges.evidence_quote: España was killed in a conflict between the Choneros and a rival gang by the name of the Queseros.

descriptions: Los Queseros were former enemies of Los Choneros.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Los Queseros (anteriormente)

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Los Lagartos, Los Lobos, Los Tiguerones, Los Chone Killers

edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Los Tiguerones

descriptions: Los Choneros has a partnership with PCC in the South Atlantic.
edges.evidence_quote: También tienen una sociedad en el Atlántico sudamericano con el Primer comando capital de Brasil.

descriptions: Los Choneros act as the armed wing of the Sinaloa Cartel in Ecuador.
edges.evidence_quote: The Choneros function as the armed wing of the Sinaloa Cartel within Ecuador.

descriptions: Los Choneros partners with Sinaloa Cartel in cocaine shipments.
edges.evidence_quote: según la policía ecuatoriana son socios en el envío de cocaína con los carteles mexicanos especialmente el Cártel de Sinaloa

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Sinaloa Cartel, Clan del Golfo, Urías Rondón Front, Kompania Bello

descriptions: Los Lagartos are the fiercest rivals of Los Choneros, competing for territorial control.
edges.evidence_quote: Son los máximos rivales acérrimos de Los Choneros con quienes se disputan el control de territorios y de plazas

descriptions: Los Lobos and Los Choneros fought in a prison riot.
edges.evidence_quote: a dispute between Los Lobos and Los Choneros in the Litoral Penitentiary, Guayaquil, led to a riot that killed 123 inmates

descriptions: Los Lobos and Los Choneros were in a violent dispute leading to a deadly prison riot.
edges.evidence_quote: El 9 de septiembre de 2023 una disputa entre Los Lobos y Los Choneros en la Penitenciaría del Litoral, Guayaquil, llevó a un motín que dejó 123 reclusos muertos

descriptions: Los Lobos and Los Choneros fought in a prison riot in 2021.
edges.evidence_quote: Em 28 de setembro de 2021, uma disputa entre Los Lobos e Los Choneros na Penitenciária do Litoral, Guayaquil, levou a um motim que matou 123 presidiários

descriptions: Los Lobos originated as a splinter group of Los Choneros.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Lobos began as a splinter group of the Los Choneros drug cartel, but broke away in 2020 after the death of Jorge Luis Zambrano

edges.evidence_quote: El subgrupo de Los Lobos ... que funcionaban como parte de Los Choneros y protagonizaron la masacre carcelaria

descriptions: Los Lobos were originally a hidden group within Los Choneros, then split off in 2020.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Lobos comenzaron como un grupo escondido del cártel de drogas Los Choneros, pero se separaron en 2020 después de la muerte de Jorge Luis Zambrano

descriptions: Los Lobos was originally a dissident group of Los Choneros, splitting in 2020.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Lobos começou como um grupo dissidente do cartel de drogas Los Choneros, mas se separou em 2020 após a morte de Jorge Luis Zambrano

descriptions: Los Tiguerones split from Los Choneros in 2020.
edges.evidence_quote: The group split from Los Choneros in 2020, along with Los Lobos and Los Chone Killers following the murder of Los Choneros leader Jorge Luis Zambrano.

descriptions: Los Tiguerones were formerly part of Los Choneros but later attacked them.
edges.evidence_quote: El subgrupo de ... Los Tiguerones ... que funcionaban como parte de Los Choneros y protagonizaron la masacre carcelaria

edges.evidence_quote: El grupo se dividió de Los Choneros en 2021, junto con Los Lobos y Los Chone Killers tras el asesinato del líder de Los Choneros, Jorge Luís Zambrano alias 'Rasquiña'.

descriptions: Choneros is an ally of Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: international alliances are thought to include ... Choneros

descriptions: Sinaloa Cartel has a longstanding partnership with Los Choneros.
edges.evidence_quote: The CDS is said to have a longstanding partnership with one of Ecuador's largest and most powerful criminal groups; The Choneros

'Ndrina Valle.description: The Valle clan is a 'Ndrangheta group originally from Reggio Calabria, Italy, that relocated to Vigevano and Cisliano in the 1980s. Allied with the Lampada family and linked to the De Stefano clan, they are active in real estate, gambling, and restaurants. The clan faced arrests in the 1990s, and their confiscated property, La Masseria, was assigned to the municipality of Cisliano in 2021 after a prolonged legal and community struggle.

descriptions: The Valle clan is linked to the De Stefano clan.
edges.evidence_quote: legati ai De Stefano

descriptions: During the first 'ndrangheta war in the 1970s, the Valle clan sided with the De Stefano clan.
edges.evidence_quote: erano schierati con i De Stefano

descriptions: The Valle clan is allied with the Lampada clan.
edges.evidence_quote: alleati dei Lampada

OutLaw Gangster Disciples.description: A subset of the Gangster Disciples street gang, formed in the early 1990s in Chicago's Cabrini-Green housing project by Charles 'Big Chuck' Dorsey. It engages in drug trafficking, robbery, extortion, and murder, with an estimated 25,000–50,000 members as of 2009. The gang has expanded to Chicago's South Side and has been documented in the U.S. military.

descriptions: OutLaw Gangster Disciples is rival of Black Disciples.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: People Nation , Ku Klux Klan , WPU (White Power United), and Black Disciples

descriptions: OutLaw Gangster Disciples is allied with Black Guerilla Family.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Folk Nation , Crips , Zoe Pound Gang , Black Guerilla Family , and Black Mafia Family

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Folk Nation , Crips , Zoe Pound Gang , Black Guerilla Family , and Black Mafia Family

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Folk Nation , Crips , Zoe Pound Gang , Black Guerilla Family , and Black Mafia Family

edges.evidence_quote: The OutLaw Gangster Disciple Nation is a subset of the Gangster Disciples street gang.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: People Nation , Ku Klux Klan , WPU (White Power United), and Black Disciples

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: People Nation , Ku Klux Klan , WPU (White Power United), and Black Disciples

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: People Nation , Ku Klux Klan , WPU (White Power United), and Black Disciples

edges.evidence_quote: Uno de los más prominentes líderes del cartel fue el narcotraficante Justo Pastor Perafán , organización que dirigía a la par con el Cartel del Cauca, basado en la ciudad de Popayán .

descriptions: 211 Crew merged with Aryan Syndicate to form the Aryan Empire.
edges.evidence_quote: Eventually 2-11 merged with the Colorado prison gangs Aryan Syndicate and ANP (American Nazi Party but no relation to the group founded by Rockwell).

descriptions: Alvaro helped broker peace involving Condello-Rosmini-Imerti.
edges.evidence_quote: La pax mafiosa è stata raggiunta solo con l'intervento di ... dagli Alvaro di Sinopoli

edges.evidence_quote: La pax mafiosa è stata raggiunta solo con l'intervento di Cosa nostra

edges.evidence_quote: Lo scontro inizia nel 1985 con la secessione dei Condello- Rosmini - Imerti dal clan De Stefano

descriptions: Gallace are allied with Leuzzi di Stignano.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleate dei Leuzzi di Stignano e dei Ruga di Monasterace.

edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleate dei ... Leuzzi di Stignano

Downtown Gang.description: The Downtown Gang was a criminal organization based in Galveston, Texas, founded around 1920 by Johnny Jack Nounes. It dominated organized crime in Galveston during Prohibition, engaging in bootlegging, gambling, and other illegal activities. The gang had connections with the Chicago Outfit and New York mobsters. It declined after 1935.

descriptions: The Downtown Gang and Beach Gang were rivals, fighting for control of Galveston island.
edges.evidence_quote: They were the rival gang of Ollie Quinn and Dutch Voight's Beach Gang.

descriptions: The Downtown Gang had a business partnership with the Chicago Outfit through Frank Nitti.
edges.evidence_quote: Some of the gang's popular business partners were the Chicago Outfit's Frank Nitti

descriptions: The Maceo Syndicate, successors to the Beach Gang, ordered the assassination of Downtown Gang member George Musey.
edges.evidence_quote: George Musey was assassinated through orders by the Beach Gang's successors, the Maceo Syndicate

descriptions: The Maceo Organization was a rival of the Downtown Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Downtown Gang

Clan dei Casamonica.description: The Clan dei Casamonica is a Romani mafia organization based in Rome, Italy, originating from Abruzzo and Molise. Founded in the late 1930s by Luciano Casamonica and Adelaide Spada, it evolved from semi-nomadic horse traders into a structured criminal group. The clan controls various illegal activities in Rome and Lazio, with ties to the Banda della Magliana. It remains active today.

descriptions: Alvaro formed a sodalizio with Casamonica for money laundering.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 25 marzo 2010 viene scoperto un sodalizio tra Pietro D'Ardes, Rocco Casamonica del clan dei Casamonica e i affiliati alla 'ndrangheta dei Piromalli - Molè e Alvaro per il riciclaggio dei proventi illeciti

descriptions: Fazzari members are in close contact with the Casamonica clan in Rome.
edges.evidence_quote: esponenti della Famiglia Fazzari in stretto contatto con le locali organizzazioni criminali, tra cui ... i Casamonica

descriptions: The Molè, Piromalli, and Alvaro formed a partnership with the Casamonica clan for money laundering.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 25 marzo 2010 viene scoperto un sodalizio tra Pietro D'Ardes, Rocco Casamonica del clan dei Casamonica e affiliati alla 'Ndrangheta dei Piromalli -Molè e Alvaro per il riciclaggio dei proventi illeciti

descriptions: Piromalli allied with Casamonica for money laundering and setting up companies.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 25 marzo 2010 viene scoperto un sodalizio tra Pietro D'Ardes, Rocco Casamonica del clan dei Casamonica e affiliati alla 'ndrangheta dei Piromalli- Molè e Alvaro per il riciclaggio dei proventi illeciti e costituzione di società

descriptions: The Casamonica and Spada clans are described as a single mafia organization.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan dei Casamonica e degli Spada sono un' organizzazione criminale mafiosa

descriptions: 'Ndrangheta is listed as an ally of Casamonica clan in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Banda della Magliana, 'Ndrangheta, Camorra

descriptions: Casamonica clan inherited contacts with 'Ndrangheta from Banda della Magliana.
edges.evidence_quote: With the dismantling of the Banda della Magliana, the Clan increased its criminal power by inheriting its criminal dealings and contacts with Camorra and 'Ndrangheta.

descriptions: Casamonica members formed a partnership with 'Ndrangheta families for money laundering in 2010.
edges.evidence_quote: scoperto un sodalizio tra Pietro D'Ardes, Rocco Casamonica e affiliati alla 'ndrangheta delle famiglie Piromalli - Molè - Alvaro per il riciclaggio dei proventi illeciti

descriptions: The Casamonica clan has relationships with important 'Ndrangheta families, including the Piromalli.
edges.evidence_quote: Mi risulta che abbiano rapporti anche con importanti famiglie di 'ndrangheta, fra cui i Piromalli di Gioia Tauro.

descriptions: The Casamonica clan was part of a criminal organization that included 'ndrine of Polistena, Taurianova, and Melicucco.
edges.evidence_quote: L'11 maggio 2016 viene sgominata a Roma una organizzazione criminale tra elementi criminali di etnia rom abruzzese, il clan dei Casamonica, esponenti della camorra e delle 'ndrine di Polistena , Taurianova e del locale di Melicucco .

descriptions: Casamonica members formed a partnership with Alvaro family for money laundering in 2010.
edges.evidence_quote: scoperto un sodalizio tra Pietro D'Ardes, Rocco Casamonica e affiliati alla 'ndrangheta delle famiglie Piromalli - Molè - Alvaro per il riciclaggio dei proventi illeciti

descriptions: Casamonica members formed a partnership with Molè family for money laundering in 2010.
edges.evidence_quote: scoperto un sodalizio tra Pietro D'Ardes, Rocco Casamonica e affiliati alla 'ndrangheta delle famiglie Piromalli - Molè - Alvaro per il riciclaggio dei proventi illeciti

descriptions: Casamonica members formed a partnership with Piromalli family for money laundering in 2010.
edges.evidence_quote: scoperto un sodalizio tra Pietro D'Ardes, Rocco Casamonica e affiliati alla 'ndrangheta delle famiglie Piromalli - Molè - Alvaro per il riciclaggio dei proventi illeciti

descriptions: The Casamonica clan has drug trafficking ties with the Piromalli 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Mi risulta che abbiano rapporti anche con importanti famiglie di 'ndrangheta, fra cui i Piromalli di Gioia Tauro.

descriptions: Casamonica clan allied with Banda della Magliana from 1970s to 1990s.
edges.evidence_quote: The rise to the conquest of the illicit traffic of Rome, occurred, starting from 1970s, with the criminal alliance of the Banda della Magliana, and lasted until the 1990s.

descriptions: Casamonica clan had criminal collusion with Banda della Magliana, which provided contacts.
edges.evidence_quote: Its criminal rise took place in the early 1970s, with criminal collusion with the Banda della Magliana, which provided it with initial contacts with Camorra, 'Ndrangheta and Mafia.

descriptions: Banda della Magliana used Casamonica members as criminal manpower in the 1980s.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni ottanta, per esempio, la Banda della Magliana ha spesso utilizzato componenti del clan come manovalanza criminale

descriptions: The Casamonica clan collaborated with Enrico Nicoletti, former cashier of the Banda della Magliana.
edges.evidence_quote: Si hanno notizie di collaborazione del clan dei Casamonica con l'ex cassiere della Banda della Magliana, Enrico Nicoletti

descriptions: The two organizations were linked through criminal collaboration in the Tor Vergata construction project.
edges.evidence_quote: la costruzione della seconda università di Roma a Tor Vergata contribuisce a legare il sodalizio criminale tra la Banda della Magliana e il clan Casamonica

descriptions: Members of the Banda della Magliana and Dante Casamonica were involved together in arms and drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 20 aprile 1994 scatta una maxi operazione contro il traffico di armi ... e droga che vede coinvolti esponenti della Banda della Magliana , un agente di Polizia e Dante Casamonica .

descriptions: Casamonica clan allied with Camorra members.
edges.evidence_quote: On 11 May 2016, a criminal alliance between the Sinti criminal organization Casamonica clan , members of the Camorra, and affiliates from the 'Ndrangheta 's of Polistena , Taurianova and Melicucco was dismantled by the police.

descriptions: Camorra is listed as an ally of Casamonica clan in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Banda della Magliana, 'Ndrangheta, Camorra

descriptions: Casamonica clan inherited contacts with Camorra from Banda della Magliana.
edges.evidence_quote: With the dismantling of the Banda della Magliana, the Clan increased its criminal power by inheriting its criminal dealings and contacts with Camorra and 'Ndrangheta.

descriptions: The Casamonica clan interacted with the Camorra through the mediation of boss Raffaele Cutolo.
edges.evidence_quote: la mediazione del boss camorrista Raffaele Cutolo dal carcere

descriptions: The Casamonica clan was part of a criminal organization that included members of the Camorra and 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: L'11 maggio 2016 viene sgominata a Roma una organizzazione criminale tra elementi criminali di etnia rom abruzzese, il clan dei Casamonica, esponenti della camorra e delle 'ndrine di Polistena , Taurianova e del locale di Melicucco .

descriptions: The Spada clan is described as contiguous to the Casamonica clan, indicating close association.
edges.evidence_quote: Gli atti di violenza e intimidazione riportano l'attenzione sull'infiltrazione del metodo mafioso nella capitale, già segnalata per altri simili episodi ad opera del clan Spada , contiguo a quello dei Casamonica.

descriptions: Spada family is affiliated with Casamonica clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Police operations that led to the arrest not only of members of the Clan, but also of members of other affiliated families of Sinti origin, such as the Spada and the Di Silvio

descriptions: The two clans are described as a single criminal organization.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan dei Casamonica e degli Spada sono un' organizzazione criminale mafiosa

descriptions: The two clans are described as a single mafia organization, indicating structural unity.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan dei Casamonica e degli Spada sono un' organizzazione criminale mafiosa di origine rom e operante nell'area di Roma

descriptions: The two clans are described as a single criminal organization, indicating a structural tie.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan dei Casamonica e degli Spada sono un' organizzazione criminale mafiosa di origine rom e operante nell'area di Roma

descriptions: The two clans are described as a single criminal organization, indicating they are structurally merged or allied.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan dei Casamonica e degli Spada sono un' organizzazione criminale mafiosa di origine rom e operante nell'area di Roma e presenti, con le loro ramificazioni, in diverse altre zone del Lazio .

descriptions: Members of the two clans clashed in a violent incident in 1969.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 23 gennaio 1969 al Mandrione scoppiano incidenti fra un centinaio di persone, che vedono fronteggiarsi membri del clan Casamonica e membri del clan Di Silvio.

descriptions: The Casamonica, Spada, Di Silvio, and De Rosa families jointly operated a surveillance system for their criminal activities.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel gennaio del 2012, ... i Casamonica, ma anche gli Spada, i Di Silvio, i De Rosa, avevano installato all'interno delle abitazioni un sistema di video sorveglianza ...

descriptions: Di Silvio family is affiliated with Casamonica clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Police operations that led to the arrest not only of members of the Clan, but also of members of other affiliated families of Sinti origin, such as the Spada and the Di Silvio

descriptions: The Casamonica clan has historical ties with the Mazzarella clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Storici i rapporti con il clan Mazzarella

descriptions: Members of Spinelli clan raided a Casamonica villa, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: un gruppo composto da membri del clan Spinelli fa irruzione, scagliandosi contro una lussuosa villa in via Domenico Baccarini abitata da altri Casamonica

descriptions: The Casamonica, Spada, Di Silvio, and De Rosa families jointly operated a surveillance system for their criminal activities.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel gennaio del 2012, ... i Casamonica, ma anche gli Spada, i Di Silvio, i De Rosa, avevano installato all'interno delle abitazioni un sistema di video sorveglianza ...

descriptions: The Casamonica and Morelli families clashed violently in 1956.
edges.evidence_quote: Da una parte la famiglia Casamonica contrapposta alla famiglia Morelli, che si scontrano con coltelli, roncole, bastoni e fruste.

descriptions: The Casamonica clan had criminal links with the Mafia Capitale network.
edges.evidence_quote: sono stati accertati i loro legami criminali con il clan dei Casamonica

descriptions: The Casamonica clan is active with the Camorra clan led by Michele Senese, a main drug supplier.
edges.evidence_quote: i Casamonica sarebbero, inoltre, in attività col clan camorristico capeggiato da Michele Senese, il quale costituiva, per i Casamonica, una delle principali fonti di approvvigionamento di stupefacenti

descriptions: Casamonica clan helped eliminate the Proietti clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Clan helps the Banda della Magliana in eliminating the rival Proietti Clan which occurred between the end of the 1970s and the beginning of the 1980s.

descriptions: The Casamonica clan was involved in paying ransom for a kidnapping by the Red Brigades.
edges.evidence_quote: il rapimento da parte delle Brigate Rosse dell'assessore campano Ciro Cirillo, rilasciato il 24 luglio 1981 dopo il riscatto che sarebbe stato pagato con i soldi portati dalla cordata Nicoletti-Casamonica

descriptions: The Casamonica clan has ties with the Alleanza di Secondigliano through Salvatore Esposito.
edges.evidence_quote: Salvatore Esposito racconta un altro rapporto di livello della casata. Esposito, infatti, è figlio di Luigi, detto "Nacchella", braccio destro del defunto Gennaro Licciardi, detto "'a scimmia", uno dei re del narcotraffico, esponente di vertice dell'Alleanza di Secondigliano

descriptions: In The Godfather, Murder Inc. is the armed wing of the Roth Syndicate.
edges.evidence_quote: Murder Inc. is revealed to be the execution armed wing of the Roth Syndicate

descriptions: Minore clan had a fierce rivalry with Rimi clan in the 1960s-1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: Both the Minore and Buccellato clan developed a fierce rivalry with the Rimi Mafia clan

descriptions: Società di Polistena is dependent on the Mandamento tirrenico.
edges.evidence_quote: dipendente dal Mandamento tirrenico

Hoxton Gang.description: The Hoxton Gang was an independent street gang based in Soho, London, during the interwar years. They fought against Charles 'Darby' Sabini and the 'Italian Mob' for control of gambling clubs and racetracks. In 1936, members attacked a bookmaker at Lewes racetrack, leading to convictions. The gang was led by Jimmy Spinks.

descriptions: The Bethnal Green Mob and Hoxton Mob were allies.
edges.evidence_quote: Bethnal Green Mob who were allies with the Hoxton Mob

descriptions: Kimber formed alliances with the Hoxton Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Kimber formed alliances with smaller organisations such as the Hoxton Gang and the Elephant and Castle Mob.

descriptions: Infobox lists Hoxton Gang as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Birmingham Boys and Hoxton Gang

descriptions: Hoxton mob harassed Sabini's businesses, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: his businesses were routinely harassed by street gangs such as the Hoxton mob

descriptions: Carlo Gambino of the Gambino family threatened Angelo La Barbera to stop his heroin smuggling.
edges.evidence_quote: La Barbera tried to smuggle heroin from Mexico into the US, but was stopped by Carlo Gambino, the boss of the powerful Gambino crime family in New York City, who threatened to kill him if he would proceed.

descriptions: The La Barbera family and the Greco clan were on opposite sides in the First Mafia War.
edges.evidence_quote: The conflict erupted over an underweight shipment of heroin... between clans allied with the Grecos... and clans allied with the La Barberas.

descriptions: Ferraro-Raccosta and Mazzagatti-Polimeni-Bonarrigo were in a faida.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1992 scoppia la cosiddetta faida di Oppido Mamertina tra i Ferraro-Raccosta e i Mazzagatti - Polimeni-Bonarrigo che provocherà 22 morti.

Cártel del Noreste.description: Mexican criminal and terrorist organization formed in 2015 after a split from Los Zetas following the capture of Omar Treviño Morales. Based in Nuevo Laredo, Tamaulipas, it engages in drug trafficking, kidnapping, extortion, human trafficking, money laundering, and murder. Designated as a foreign terrorist organization by the U.S. State Department in February 2025. Controls territory in several Mexican states and has operational presence in the United States, Guatemala, Honduras, and Colombia.

descriptions: Cártel de Caborca is listed as an enemy of the Cártel del Noreste in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Los Chapitos , Cártel Jalisco Nueva Generación , Los Metros , Cártel de Caborca , Los Ciclones , Cártel de Juárez , La Familia Michoacana , Zetas Vieja Escuela

descriptions: CJNG is listed as a rival of Cártel del Noreste in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: CJNG, Gulf Cartel, Zetas Vieja Escuela, La Línea (Juaréz Cartel), Sinaloa Cartel

descriptions: Cártel Jalisco Nueva Generación is listed as an enemy of the Cártel del Noreste in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Los Chapitos , Cártel Jalisco Nueva Generación , Los Metros , Cártel de Caborca , Los Ciclones , Cártel de Juárez , La Familia Michoacana , Zetas Vieja Escuela

descriptions: Fuerzas Especiales 35 Coahuila is a group theoretically part of Los Chukys, operating under the Cártel del Noreste.
edges.evidence_quote: - Fuerzas Especiales 35 Coahuila: Teóricamente de Los Chukys, operan en el estado de Coahuila en las regiones del norte mayormente así como en municipios rurales y comunidades agrícolas.

descriptions: Fuerzas Especiales Chukys is the elite operational group of the Cártel del Noreste.
edges.evidence_quote: Lo que se llama las Fuerzas Especiales Chukys o (Los Chukys) es el grupo operativo del Cartel del Noreste (CDN) especializado en acciones de alto impacto.

descriptions: Gulf Cartel is listed as a rival of Cártel del Noreste in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: CJNG, Gulf Cartel, Zetas Vieja Escuela, La Línea (Juaréz Cartel), Sinaloa Cartel

descriptions: The Cártel del Noreste disputes territory in Tamaulipas with the Cártel del Golfo.
edges.evidence_quote: se disputan el territorio de Tamaulipas con organizaciones criminales como Los Zetas Vieja Escuela y el Cártel del Golfo

descriptions: The Cártel del Noreste is in conflict with the Cártel del Golfo, its rival.
edges.evidence_quote: pugnas que la han debilitado e hicieron que perdiera por un momento influencia en toda la región frente a su rival: El Cártel del Golfo.

descriptions: Zetas Vieja Escuela is aligned with the Gulf Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: They are aligned with their original employers, the Gulf Cartel.

descriptions: Cártel de Juárez is listed as an enemy of the Cártel del Noreste in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Los Chapitos , Cártel Jalisco Nueva Generación , Los Metros , Cártel de Caborca , Los Ciclones , Cártel de Juárez , La Familia Michoacana , Zetas Vieja Escuela

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: CJNG, Gulf Cartel, Zetas Vieja Escuela, La Línea (Juaréz Cartel), Sinaloa Cartel

descriptions: La Mayiza is listed as an ally of the Cártel del Noreste in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: La Mayiza , Cártel de Guasave

descriptions: Los Chapitos is listed as an enemy of the Cártel del Noreste in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Los Chapitos , Cártel Jalisco Nueva Generación , Los Metros , Cártel de Caborca , Los Ciclones , Cártel de Juárez , La Familia Michoacana , Zetas Vieja Escuela

descriptions: Los Ciclones is listed as an enemy of the Cártel del Noreste in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Los Chapitos , Cártel Jalisco Nueva Generación , Los Metros , Cártel de Caborca , Los Ciclones , Cártel de Juárez , La Familia Michoacana , Zetas Vieja Escuela

descriptions: Los Fantasmas is a violent cell of the Cártel del Noreste.
edges.evidence_quote: - Los Fantasmas: Centrados en el municipio de Galeana, N.L, se considera célula violenta del CDN.

descriptions: Cártel de Guasave is listed as an ally of the Cártel del Noreste in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: La Mayiza , Cártel de Guasave

edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Los Chapitos , Cártel Jalisco Nueva Generación , Los Metros , Cártel de Caborca , Los Ciclones , Cártel de Juárez , La Familia Michoacana , Zetas Vieja Escuela

descriptions: The Treviño family, founders of the Cártel del Noreste, were associated with Los Texas.
edges.evidence_quote: Anteriormente, la familia Treviño Morales... tenían relación con una pandilla que controlaba la ciudad de Nuevo Laredo llamada Los Texas .

descriptions: Operativo Nuevo León is an armed wing of the Cártel del Noreste.
edges.evidence_quote: - Operativo Nuevo León: Es un brazo armado que operan en el estado de Nuevo León del norte al sur con actividades delictivas.

descriptions: Sinaloa Cartel is listed as a rival of Cártel del Noreste in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: CJNG, Gulf Cartel, Zetas Vieja Escuela, La Línea (Juaréz Cartel), Sinaloa Cartel

descriptions: La Tropa del Infierno is the armed wing of the Cártel del Noreste.
edges.evidence_quote: La "Tropa del Infierno" es el brazo armado del Cártel del Noreste

descriptions: Tropa del Infierno is a cell within the Cártel del Noreste.
edges.evidence_quote: se le identifica como presunto cabecilla de la Tropa del Infierno

Dömötör-Kolompár criminal organization.description: Canadian human trafficking ring composed of an extended Romani family from Pápa, Hungary. The organization moved to Hamilton, Ontario, and lured up to 19 people from Hungary starting in 2008, forcing them into unfree labor. Leader Ferenc Dömötör was arrested in 2010, and multiple members were convicted and deported.

descriptions: Hane-gumi is a branch of Yamaguchi-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: the Mie Prefecture -based Hane-gumi branch of Yamaguchi-gumi

descriptions: Franconeri and Lucà were in conflict over olive trade.
edges.evidence_quote: scontro tra i Franconeri, di Rizziconi, e i Lucà

descriptions: The Jokers were bitter rivals of South Brooklyn Boys and fought many times.
edges.evidence_quote: A small but fierce gang known as the "Jokers" was a bitter rival, led by a man known as "Cannonball." The two groups fought many times.

descriptions: Latin Counts named themselves after the Polish Counts gang.
edges.evidence_quote: inspired by the Polish Counts gang that operated in the nearby Back of the Yards community

descriptions: Latella-Ficara were in a feud with Chilà-Ambrogio in the 1980s.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni '80 sono coinvolti in una faida tra i Latella-Ficara e i Chilà-Ambrogio di Pellaro

descriptions: Latella 'ndrina was in a feud with Chilà-Ambrogio 'ndrina in the 1980s.
edges.evidence_quote: In the 1980s, The Latella 'ndrina was involved in a feud with Chilà-Ambrogio 'ndrina

descriptions: Paraguayan People's Army trained PCC's Sintonia Restrita members.
edges.evidence_quote: Sintonia Restrita members would be trained by the Paraguayan People's Army

descriptions: Crazy Brother Clan is listed as a rival of Asian Boyz in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bloods, East Side Longos, Smiley Dragon, Tiny Rascal Gang, Crazy Brother Clan, Vietnamese Boyz, Wah Ching, Fresno Bulldogs

descriptions: The Trimarco family split from the Pecoraro-Renna clan.
edges.evidence_quote: All'interno del clan si sarebbero verificate delle scissioni, a séguito delle quali sarebbero sorti due gruppi autonomi facenti capo alle famiglie Trimarco, Frappaolo e Giffoni.

descriptions: Africa Corps cooperates with the Bears Brigade.
edges.evidence_quote: The formation cooperates with other government-controlled structures, like the " Bears Brigade " in Africa.

descriptions: The Lyons and Daniel families have been in a deadly feud since 2001.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 2001, the Lyons family has been embroiled in a longstanding and deadly feud with another Glasgow-based crime family , the Daniel Crime Family.

GTA gang.description: The GTA gang was a violent gang of murderers and terrorists near Moscow, Russia, formed in March 2012 by Ibaydullo Subkhanov to train soldiers for ISIL. They robbed and murdered motorists on the M-4 highway using homemade caltrops, and were responsible for 17 murders. The gang was captured in a police raid in November 2014, with Subkhanov killed.

descriptions: The infobox lists Hizb ut-Tahrir as an ally of the GTA gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ISIL and Hizb ut-Tahrir

descriptions: The GTA gang was formed to train soldiers for ISIL.
edges.evidence_quote: Formed in March 2012 by Ibaydullo Subkhanov to train soldiers for the Islamic State of Iraq and the Levant (ISIL)
